zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye是Edward Trye和Sybil Monington的女兒，於1525年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾哈德維其可。她於1548年與Hugh Dennis在英國格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年4月15日在英國格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其享年57歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye是Edward Trye和Sybil Monington的女儿，于1525年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾哈德維其可。她于1548年与Hugh Dennis在英国格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1582年4月15日在英国格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其享年57岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾普可萊其。

nameMeanings.name: Trye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Try
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English trie, triʒe ‘trustworthy, faithful’ (Old French trie).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Trie (Oise), France.
Cambodian: written ទ្រី, of Chinese origin, but unexplained etymology.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye was born in 1525, in Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England as the daughter of Edward Trye and Sybil Monington. She married Hugh Dennis in 1548, in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 15 April 1582, in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye est née en 1525, à Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, fille d’Edward Trye et Sybil Monington. Elle a épousé Hugh Dennis en 1548, à Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 avril 1582, à Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye wurde 1525 in Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England, als Tochter von Edward Trye und Sybil Monington geboren. Sie hat 1548 in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England Hugh Dennis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. April 1582 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye è nata il nel 1525 nel Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England come figlia di Edward Trye e Sybil Monington. Lei sposato Hugh Dennis nel 1548, nel Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 aprile 1582, nel Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Tryeは1525年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアハードウィクでEdward TryeとSybil Moningtonの娘として生まれた。1548年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアプウックレチャーチでHugh Dennisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年4月15日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアプウックレチャーチで57歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアプウックレチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye(은)는 1525년 영국 그루스스터실르 하르드윅에서 Edward Trye(와)과 Sybil Monington의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1548년 영국 그루스스터실르 푸클렉후르치에서 Hugh Dennis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 4월 15일 영국 그루스스터실르 푸클렉후르치에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 푸클렉후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye nasceu em 1525, em Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra filha de Edward Trye e Sybil Monington. Ela casou-se com Hugh Dennis em 1548, em Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de abril de 1582, em Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye родилась в 1525 г. в местности хардвикк, глоусестиршир, Англия. Её родителей звали Edward Trye и Sybil Monington. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Dennis в 1548 г. в местности пукклечурч, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 апреля 1582 г. в местности пукклечурч, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности пукклечурч, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Katherine Trye nació en 1525, en Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra como hija de Edward Trye y Sybil Monington. Se casó con Hugh Dennis en 1548, en Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de abril de 1582, en Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Pucklechurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
